creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
i have FreeBSD 13.3, openjdk21. Are you going fix this problem ?

10:40:42:925 - error: FreeBSD is not supported
10:40:42:977 - error: java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: FreeBSD is not supported
